ksa_text: Ability to communicate regulatory risk, compliance status, and risk assessment findings to executive and board-level audiences in business impact language.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Excluded on seniority grounds: the ability contains explicit executive/organizational scope signals ('board.level'), placing it above IC-to-senior-IC Data Engineer level. STRM composite score is minimal (0.0000 — likely framework vocabulary mismatch, not irrelevance); semantic alignment with data frameworks may be present, but the described responsibilities involve setting or leading organizational programs rather than executing technical data work. Data Engineers implement within structures they do not establish.

pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: External validation confirms exclusion: 0 match(es) in DE job postings or certification curricula. A gap here would not be noticeable to a working Data Engineer focused on pipeline, modeling, and data platform responsibilities.
